import tarfile
import os

def extract_archive(archive_path: str, dest: str):
    with tarfile.open(archive_path, "r:gz") as tar:
        tar.extractall(path=dest)

def unpack_upload(upload_path: str):
    target = "/tmp/uploads"
    with tarfile.open(upload_path, "r:*") as tar:
        tar.extractall(target)
    return target

def restore_backup(backup_file: str, restore_dir: str):
    with tarfile.open(backup_file, "r:bz2") as archive:
        archive.extractall(path=restore_dir)

def deploy_package(pkg_path: str):
    extract_to = "/opt/app"
    with tarfile.open(pkg_path, "r:gz") as tarball:
        tarball.extractall(extract_to)
    return extract_to
